title: codonocarpus australis
intro: Codonocarpus australis, also known as the Burdett Pine or Wollemi Pine, is a unique plant species that is native to Australia and is considered a living fossil. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Codonocarpus australis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
